---
title: "Retirement Analysis Report"
subtitle: "Case: Alex + Jamie — Baseline Scenario"
author: "OWL-ROOST"
date: today
---

```{python}
import sys
from pathlib import Path
from loguru import logger

from owlroost.domain.services.metadata_loader import load_bundle
from owlroost.domain.reporting.utils import generate_table, render_relevant_table

logger.remove()
logger.add(sys.stderr, level="INFO")

```

```{python}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Load bundle
# ---------------------------------------------------------
metadata_path = Path("metadata.yaml")
bundle = load_bundle(metadata_path)
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
table = generate_table( bundle, "run", "default", "pivot", explain=[] )
print(render_relevant_table(table))

```
